summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Sparkline, Market Hours Filter, and Manual Trade features. All 22 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend UI verified with Playwright - closed markets correctly hidden, sparklines rendering, BUY/SELL buttons functional.
passed_tests: GET /api/ returns healthy status with 50 engines
All engines have sparkline field (list of floats)
Index engines have correct market_open status
WebSocket state_update includes market_open and sparkline
Frontend filter shows only 24 crypto engines (indices hidden)
Frontend active engines filter logic matches backend
Frontend sparkline SVGs render on all cards
Frontend BUY/SELL buttons visible on running engines
Frontend controls panel (stop loss, trailing stop) functional
Frontend global controls (Start, Stop, Reset) present
seed_data_creation: None - system uses real Yahoo Finance prices
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sparkline and market hours features fully implemented and tested. On weekend, all 24 index markets are correctly hidden (market_open=false), only 24 crypto markets visible (market_open=true, 24/7). Sparkline data stored in deque(maxlen=30) and exposed via get_summary(). BUY/SELL buttons appear on running engines that are not seeding. Manual trade endpoint POST /api/engines/{id}/manual-trade?side=BUY|SELL works correctly. WebSocket broadcasts market_open and sparkline fields with each engine.

closed_markets_filter.description: All 24 index markets hidden when market_open=false (weekend)

sparkline_data.description: Backend returns sparkline array (list of floats) for each engine

sparkline_rendering.description: SVG sparkline charts render on each active engine card
sparkline_rendering.colors: green for up, red for down

buy_sell_buttons.description: BUY/SELL buttons visible on running engines not seeding

manual_trade.validation: Rejects non-running engines and invalid sides
